enrich-from-slugs.description: Enrich cards with slug stats by card name using the slugs-by-name enrich policy.

script.source: if (ctx.card_faces instanceof List && ctx.card_faces.size() > 0 && ctx.card_faces[0] instanceof Map && ctx.card_faces[0].name != null) { ctx._slug_lookup_name = ctx.card_faces[0].name; } else if (ctx.name != null) { ctx._slug_lookup_name = ctx.name; }

if (ctx._slug_match != null) { if (!(ctx.slugs instanceof Map)) { ctx.slugs = [:]; } if (ctx._slug_match.sanitized != null) { ctx.slugs.sanitized = ctx._slug_match.sanitized; } if (ctx._slug_match.inclusion != null) { ctx.slugs.inclusion = ctx._slug_match.inclusion; } if (ctx._slug_match.inclusion_percent != null) { ctx.slugs.inclusion_percent = ctx._slug_match.inclusion_percent; } if (ctx._slug_match.potential_decks != null) { ctx.slugs.potential_decks = ctx._slug_match.potential_decks; } } ctx.remove('_slug_lookup_name'); ctx.remove('_slug_match');
